# -i flag: force rebuild of missing intermediates
# Without -i, mk pretends prog.o exists when prog is newer than prog.c.
# With -i, mk forces rebuilding the missing prog.o.
cp prog prog
cp prog.c prog.c
mk -i -n -p 1 -f mkfile
stdout 'cc prog.c'
stdout 'link prog.o'

-- mkfile --
prog: prog.o
	link prog.o
prog.o: prog.c
	cc prog.c
-- prog --
binary
-- prog.c --
source
